response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience with strong fundamentals in TDD, distributed systems, and high-throughput services (notably Sociomantic's millions of HTTP req/s). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, or growth/measurement systems — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Current title is Senior/Staff rather than Principal, and there's limited evidence of cross-team platform leadership at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Deep polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node, C/C++, Java, DLang) with 15+ years across web, embedded, and high-throughput backends
Strong software craftsmanship foundation: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling authorship (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Low-latency distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, or statistical analysis workflows
No evidence of building telemetry/measurement platforms consumed by multiple teams across an organization
Career trajectory is Senior/Staff IC — limited signal of Principal/IC6-level cross-org architectural leadership

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and polyglot breadth
